name: English Rocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add eggs to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. In a separate bowl, sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and salt).
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with buttermilk, until just combined.
5. Mix in vanilla, allspice, and any remaining dry ingredient.
6. Fold in chopped fruits (cherries, pineapple, dates) and nuts (pecans).
7. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 25 minutes at 300 degrees Fahrenheit. Do not overcook or burn the cookies.
